title: Muktzeh: The Things You Can't Move on Shabbat
title_zh: 穆克茨(Muktzeh):安息日不可移动之物
target_audience: Chinese native Mandarin speakers with no prior Jewish knowledge
learning_objectives: Understand the five categories of muktzeh
Learn which items can and cannot be moved on Shabbat
Grasp the spiritual purpose behind muktzeh laws
Apply practical muktzeh knowledge in daily Shabbat observance
Appreciate philosophical connections between Jewish and Chinese wisdom traditions
halachic_sources: Shemirath Shabbath Kehilchatha (Rabbi Yehoshua Y. Neuwirth)
The Shabbos Home (Rabbi Simcha Bunim Cohen)
author: Torah Light Project
